comments.text:
Make that a memory now please (the general principle, especially as applied to left/right).

This is a strongly held opinion by me, not a widely accepted principle, just to be clear.

comments.author: Steve
comments.text: agreed, let's do that exactly then

comments.author: Steve
comments.text: Yes, thanks for making those two changes in the middle of the much longer effort. This communication channel is working extremely well for me.
